skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle and when Full Burst ends
skill1.note: Start-of-battle formation check; FB-end re-evaluation is implicit in the formation gate

skill1.kitLine: Effect varies according to squad formation. Only one effect is applied.
Affects self if there are no Burst 1 allies → Combat Assist: Changes to Burst Stage 1 (continuous)
skill1.note: Grants stage-1 eligibility so she can burst in the B1 slot

skill1.kitLine: Affects self if there are Burst 1 allies → Cancels Combat Assist
skill1.note: With a B1 ally present, block[0] never fires → no eligibility granted. No explicit cancel block needed.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst while in Combat Assist status. Affects all allies. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 7.48 sec.
skill1.note: Team CDR on each FB when she IS the B1

skill1.kitLine: Attack Damage ▲ 8.02% for 10 sec (all allies, in Combat Assist)
Activates when entering Full Burst while NOT in Combat Assist status. Affects self. ATK ▲ 95.04% for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[2] trigger:fullBurstEnter, formation:hasB1, target:self, effects:buff atkPct 95.04 10s
skill1.note: Self ATK buff when a real B1 exists; note confirms this IS live (unlike the +421.2%)

skill1.kitLine: Damage to Interruption Parts ▲ 48% for 10 sec (self, not in Combat Assist)
skill1.note: Partless single-boss sim → interruption parts do not exist; inert by scope

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Applies Elemental Advantage damage to Electric Code enemies continuously.
skill2.note: Grants elemental advantage vs Electric (fire beats electric in the advantage table)
Permanent self-buff routing to attachment damage type; engine-verified per kit-status
Permanent self-buff routing to explosion damage type; engine-verified per kit-status

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 120 normal attack(s). Attachable Projectiles: launches projectile that attaches; explodes on FB entry.
skill2.note: 120 threshold out of FB, 60 in FB (models the burst's ▼60 reduction). Meter carryover modeled as threshold switch per note.

skill2.kitLine: Projectile Attachment Damage: Deals 88.11% of final ATK as damage (immediate on attach)
skill2.note: Immediate hit on rocket attach; scaled by the 150.72% passive buff

skill2.kitLine: Projectile Explosion Damage: Deals 88.11% of final ATK as damage (stored, detonates on FB)
skill2.where: skill2[1] effects:storedHit atkPct:88.11 flavor:projectileExplosion core:0.33 crit:true instantInFb:true
skill2.note: Stored until FB; core fraction 0.33 measured (N=9, 0.30-0.45 range); crit:true landed 2026-07-16; instantInFb for in-burst attaches
Rocket ammo cap; functionally inert in sim since the hitCount trigger already gates one rocket per threshold crossing

burst.kitLine: Stage 1: Affects self. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 20 sec.
burst.note: Self CDR when bursting as B1 (Combat Assist mode)
Partless single-boss sim → explosion radius has no splash target; inert by scope

burst.kitLine: Stage 1: Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 18.01% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] trigger:burstCast stage:1, target:allies, effects:buff casterAtkPct 18.01 10s
burst.note: casterAtkPct = percentage of caster's ATK, not target's; exact value at level 10

burst.kitLine: Stage 3: Affects the enemy nearest to the crosshair. Deals 2808% of final ATK as additional damage.
burst.where: burst[2] trigger:burstCast stage:3, target:enemy, effects:flatDamage atkPct:2808 delaySec:0.4 requiresPulls:120
burst.note: Flighted missile; delaySec 0.4 measured (landing-time snapshot); requiresPulls 120 charge-gate measured (fire-weak banner-1 at ~68 shots had no nuke)

burst.kitLine: Stage 3: Affects self. Explosion Radius ▲ 100.62% for 10 sec.
burst.note: NOT in blocks, NOT in unmodeled (unmodeled.burst[0] only cites Stage 1). Functionally inert in partless sim — same dead stat as Stage 1's radius buff. Silent drop but zero damage impact.

burst.kitLine: Stage 3: Projectile Attachment Damage ▲ 421.2% for 10 sec (self)
burst.note: NOT in blocks or unmodeled array, BUT explicitly documented in the override note as MEASURED-INERT (0.13% precision, 3 comps) and deliberately REMOVED (dead datamine entry 101631006). NOT a silent drop — intentional exclusion with evidence.

burst.kitLine: Stage 3: Skill 2's requirement for triggering attachable projectiles ▼ 60 for 10 sec
burst.note: Modeled as a permanent in-FB threshold switch (120→60) rather than a timed 10s debuff. Note documents this approximation: agrees in steady state, differs at FB boundary by O(1) rocket timing.

documentedConfounds.text: +421.2% Projectile Attachment Damage buff (burst Stage 3) measured-inert and removed — dead datamine entry 101631006
documentedConfounds.why: Confirmed inert at 0.13% precision across 3 comps; removing it cannot cause a sim/real gap

documentedConfounds.text: Explosion core fraction 0.33 is an approximation (measured range 0.30–0.45, N=9)
documentedConfounds.why: If true fraction is above 0.33 the sim under-models explosion core hits; the note explicitly says 'Do NOT trim the 0.33 fraction or inflate atkPct to zero the residual'

documentedConfounds.text: Additive vs multiplicative crit/core bracket unresolved (U15, foundational open item)
documentedConfounds.why: The ×1.80 core+crit body doesn't cleanly compose under additive constants; bounded ~0.3–0.4% of total damage across all 86 readings

documentedConfounds.text: Invisible-X residual deliberately left open — corrected mechanic under-shoots recorded totals (~899.6M solo-class)
documentedConfounds.why: Part of the residual is generic MG-cold (board ~0.947) and part is the observed-but-unmodeled explosion crit magnitude; sim under-predicts

documentedConfounds.text: Carryover semantics: 2× in-FB meter modeled as threshold switch (120→60), not a +2-fill-per-hit rate
documentedConfounds.why: Rocket count conserved to O(1); only cross-boundary timing differs; a future meter-carryover measurement can discriminate

documentedConfounds.text: T7 elec-weak probe ratio 0.8823 is the board outlier (other 4 comps 0.99–1.00)
documentedConfounds.why: Likely MG-cold or element-specific interaction on Water boss; drives the MAD to 0.029 and mean to 0.972

documentedConfounds.text: Damage to Interruption Parts ▲48% (S1, hasB1 branch) — partless sim
documentedConfounds.why: Single partless boss has no interruption parts; zero damage impact by scope

documentedConfounds.text: Explosion Radius ▲100.62% (burst Stage 1 + unlisted Stage 3) — partless sim
documentedConfounds.why: No splash targets in single-boss sim; zero damage impact by scope
hitCount trigger already gates one rocket per threshold crossing; ammo cap is redundant in the sim's event model

authorIntentSummary: The override models Rapi: Red Hood as a whole-kit system where S1 formation-gates her between Combat Assist (B1 fill + team CDR/Attack Damage) and self-ATK modes, S2 provides permanent elemental advantage + projectile damage-type buffs plus a fill-meter rocket (120 out of FB, 60 in FB) with immediate attachment and stored explosion (core 0.33, crit enabled, instant in FB), and burst delivers either a B1 support package (CDR + casterAtkPct team buff) or a B3 flighted 2808% nuke (0.4s delay, charge-gated at 120 pulls). The +421.2% attachment buff was measured-inert and deliberately excluded. Key approximations: the in-FB threshold is a steady-state-equivalent switch rather than a timed debuff, the explosion core fraction is a measured point estimate (0.33) from a 0.30–0.45 range, and the additive crit/core bracket is an unresolved foundational question (U15). The sim deliberately under-predicts (mean 0.972, T7 outlier 0.88) with the residual left exposed rather than fit.
